sections.title: SCOPE
sections.text: This standard (formerly CAC/RS 76 -1976) shall apply to quick -frozen bilberries of the species Vaccinium myrtillus L. as defined below and offered for direct consumption, without further processing, except for repacking, if required.  It does not apply to the product when indicated as intended for further processing or for other industrial purposes nor to the product covered by the special standard for quick-frozen blueberries.

sections.title: Product definition
sections.text: Quick-frozen bilberries is the product prepared from fresh, clean, sound, ripe bilberries of firm texture conforming to the characteristics of Vaccinium myrtillus L. with or without a dry sugar or a syrup and is packaged and frozen in an appropriate manner.

sections.title: Process definition
sections.text: Quick-frozen bilberries is the product subjected to a freezing process in appropriate equipment and complying with the conditions laid down hereafter.  This freezing operation shall be carried out in such a way that the range of temperature of maximum crystallization is passed quickly.  The quick-freezing process shall not be regarded as complete unless and until the product temperature has reached -18 C (0 F) at the thermal centre after thermal stabilization.  The recognized practice of repacking quick-frozen products under controlled conditions is permitted.

sections.title: Handling practice
sections.text: The product shall be handled under such conditions as will maintain the quality during transportation, storage and distribution up to and including the time of final sale.  It is recommended that during storage, transportation, distribution and retail, the product be handled in accordance with the provisions in the Code of Practice for the Processing and Handling of Quick Frozen Foods (CXC 8-1976).1

sections.title: General requirements
sections.text: Quick-frozen bilberries shall be: (a) of similar varietal characteristics; (b) of good colour; (c) free from foreign flavour and odour; (d) clean, sound and practically free from mould and other harmless foreign matter; and with respect to visual or other defects subject to a tolerance, shall be: (e) practically free from sand and grit; (f) when presented as free-flowing, practically free from berries adhering one to another and which cannot be easily separated by hand without damage when in the frozen state; (g) practically free from extraneous vegetable matter (EVM); (h) reasonably free from cap stems (stalks); (i) practically free from green berries; (j) practically free from dissimilar varieties of edible berries other than bilberries; (k) reasonably free from blemished berries; and (l) reasonably free from undeveloped or mummified berries.

sections.title: Definitions for visual defects
sections.text: (a) Extraneous vegetable matter (EVM) 	6 means leaves or portions of the bilberry plant, or other similar vegetable material which is harmless. (b) Cap stems (stalks) 	6 means the immediate stem that attaches the bilberry to the plant, whether or not attached to the berry, and which is 2 mm, or greater in length. (c) Green berries 	6 means completely uncoloured berries or berries that have a green cast that predominates over the normal reddish-purple colour of bilberries. (d) Dissimilar varieties 	6 means other edible berries that are distinctly different in colour or shape, which have definitely different internal characteristics than bilberries. (e) Blemished 	6 means bilberries which show visible signs of damage by insects or by pathological injury. (f) Undeveloped or mummified 	6 means berries that are badly shrivelled, dried, or hard.

sections.retrieval_text:
PACKAGING
number=7
level=1
Packaging used for quick-frozen bilberries shall:
(a) protect the organoleptic and other quality characteristics of the product;
(b) protect the product against microbiological and other contamination;
(c) protect the product from dehydration and, where appropriate, leakage as far as technologically practicable; and
(d) not pass on to the product any odour, taste, colour or other foreign characteristics.

pages.title: STANDARD FOR QUICK-FROZEN BILBERRIES
pages.summary: Esta página contém apenas o título principal do documento e cabeçalho, sem estrutura adicional ou texto de conteúdo.
Página contém cabeçalho repetitivo e texto inicial introdutório sem títulos estruturais ou seções numeradas, portanto não há nós hierárquicos para mapear.

Página contém cabeçalho repetitivo. Estrutura identificada com três seções principais numeradas 1 SCOPE, 2 DESCRIPTION com subseções 2.1 a 2.4, e 3 ESSENTIAL COMPOSITION AND QUALITY FACTORS com subseções 3.1 e 3.2, esta última com quatro subsubseções 3.2.1 a 3.2.4. Texto de cada seção associado corretamente ao seu título. Não há continuidade de conteúdo entre páginas.

Página contém cabeçalho repetitivo. Estrutura hierárquica baseada em títulos numerados 3.3 e suas subseções 3.3.1 a 3.3.6. Texto detalhado associado a cada subseção. Continuidade da seção 3.3 iniciada na página anterior mantida, especialmente em 3.3.1, que prossegue para a próxima página.

Página contém títulos numerados das seções 3.3.7, 3.3.8, 4, e 5 com subseções em 5. A seção 3.3 e seus conteúdos anteriores continuam da página anterior. Cada título está visível na página com texto associado conforme a hierarquia indicada. Não há continuidade para próximas páginas nesta página.

A página contém as seções de níveis 1 numeradas: 6 LABELLING, 7 PACKAGING e 8 METHODS OF ANALYSIS AND SAMPLING, todas com títulos visíveis. A seção 6 possui subdivisões claras nos níveis 2 e 3, com títulos numerados de 6.1 a 6.4 e subseções em 6.1.1, 6.1.2 e 6.1.3, sem texto associado direto nos níveis 3 muito longos, pois funcionam como títulos completos. O texto está limpo, sem cabeçalhos ou rodapés repetitivos. Nenhuma seção continua de página anterior ou para a próxima página.
Página contém uma seção nível 1 'NOTES' com referências listadas. Texto limpo, sem continuidade para outras páginas.
